mapper.sql: id, order_code, user_id, customer_name, customer_email, customer_phone, shipping_address, billing_address, total_amount, discount_amount, shipping_fee, final_amount, payment_method, payment_status, order_status, note, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, is_deleted
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from orders
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into orders (order_code, user_id, customer_name, customer_email, customer_phone, shipping_address, billing_address, total_amount, discount_amount, shipping_fee, final_amount, payment_method, payment_status, order_status, note, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, is_deleted) values (#{orderCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerEmail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shippingAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{billingAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{totalAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{discountAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{shippingFee,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{finalAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{paymentMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updatedBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT})

insert into orders
order_code,
user_id,
customer_name,
customer_email,
customer_phone,
shipping_address,
billing_address,
total_amount,
discount_amount,
shipping_fee,
final_amount,
payment_method,
payment_status,
order_status,
note,
created_at,
updated_at,
created_by,
updated_by,
is_deleted,
#{orderCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{customerEmail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{customerPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{shippingAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{billingAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{totalAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{discountAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{shippingFee,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{finalAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{paymentMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{paymentStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orderStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createdBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{updatedBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT},
mapper.update:
update orders
id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
order_code = #{row.orderCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_id = #{row.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
customer_name = #{row.customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_email = #{row.customerEmail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_phone = #{row.customerPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
shipping_address = #{row.shippingAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
billing_address = #{row.billingAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
total_amount = #{row.totalAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
discount_amount = #{row.discountAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
shipping_fee = #{row.shippingFee,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
final_amount = #{row.finalAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
payment_method = #{row.paymentMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
payment_status = #{row.paymentStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_status = #{row.orderStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
note = #{row.note,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_at = #{row.createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_at = #{row.updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
created_by = #{row.createdBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
updated_by = #{row.updatedBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
is_deleted = #{row.isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT},

update orders set id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, order_code = #{row.orderCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_id = #{row.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, customer_name = #{row.customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customer_email = #{row.customerEmail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customer_phone = #{row.customerPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, shipping_address = #{row.shippingAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, billing_address = #{row.billingAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, total_amount = #{row.totalAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, discount_amount = #{row.discountAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, shipping_fee = #{row.shippingFee,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, final_amount = #{row.finalAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, payment_method = #{row.paymentMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, payment_status = #{row.paymentStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_status = #{row.orderStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, note = #{row.note,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{row.createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = #{row.updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, created_by = #{row.createdBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, updated_by = #{row.updatedBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, is_deleted = #{row.isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}

update orders
order_code = #{orderCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
customer_name = #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_email = #{customerEmail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_phone = #{customerPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
shipping_address = #{shippingAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
billing_address = #{billingAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
total_amount = #{totalAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
discount_amount = #{discountAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
shipping_fee = #{shippingFee,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
final_amount = #{finalAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
payment_method = #{paymentMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
payment_status = #{paymentStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_status = #{orderStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
note = #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
created_by = #{createdBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
updated_by = #{updatedBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update orders set order_code = #{orderCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, customer_name = #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customer_email = #{customerEmail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customer_phone = #{customerPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, shipping_address = #{shippingAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, billing_address = #{billingAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, total_amount = #{totalAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, discount_amount = #{discountAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, shipping_fee = #{shippingFee,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, final_amount = #{finalAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, payment_status = #{paymentStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_status = #{orderStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, note = #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, created_by = #{createdBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, updated_by = #{updatedBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
